open_prs.title: [Repo Assist] feat: add l_strtof (float32 string parsing)
[Repo Assist] fix: l_qsort buffer overflow for element sizes > 256 bytes
[Repo Assist] perf: word-at-a-time l_strcmp for aligned inputs
[Repo Assist] feat: add l_strsep (BSD-style string separator)
[Repo Assist] perf: word-at-a-time l_memmove backward path + fix missing test_support.h
[Repo Assist] test: add %lld/%llu/%p/%zu snprintf coverage + l_valid_hostname unit tests

notes: No human-authored issues. Six open Repo Assist PRs: #85 strtof, #86 qsort fix, #87 strcmp perf, #88 strsep, #91 memmove perf + test_support.h fix, ~#92 test coverage (snprintf lld/llu/p/zu + l_valid_hostname). test_support.h is now committed in the new PR (~#92) AND in PR #91. Pre-existing l_setenv failure on Linux (environment limitation). Next: buffered I/O helpers (l_fopen-style).
